reviews.review_description: So this is smash brothers for the quest, I haven’t seen anything like it. It’s a simple fighting game where you control a little robot that wanders into a melee trying to knock their opponents off the level. Really fun with friends, great potential I can’t wait to see what comes next!

Although an early access app lab game, it has all the hallmarks of a good time. Tried the multiplayer and it's so cool.  It feels almost like tabletop gaming but with real-time fighting robots.  A bit of "inverse Pacific Rim" going on here.  You and a friend(s) are gesturing and acting their way to epic victories.  The uppercut is pretty epic ...send your friend to the moon lol.  It's surprisingly fun to even just hang out with a friend and chat here while playing. The avatars are also robots lol.   I haven't played a lot with the painting tools yet to customise the robots but it looks fun as well .  Will definitely be following along with this development.

Great retro style fun game! with cool  bot customizations. This game gets you moving your body  - works both in VR and MR - can use your controllers and also works with just your hands. Great to see the active development and player feedback is making its way in to updates already. Really nice to see a studio being community focused.  Looking forward to seeing this already fun game evolve..

Can't wait to see where this goes, a game like this has so much potential.  Games like this are a great example of where the future of Mixed Reality games are headed. 
It's a fun fighting game in the style of Smash Brothers easy to pick up and learn the moves.

Really fun and unique mixed reality game. You get to customize a miniature robot and control it with your actual movements in an arena battle with bots or multiplayer. Feels like controlling a mini mech similar to Pacific Rim or Robot Jox.

Design your bot and have it wreck all the others.  I really like how you can custom paint your own colors and stamps onto the bot.  I really like the combat, it feels fluid and it’s fun to punch for my robot!

reviews.review_title: Great game to play with family!
reviews.review_description: My kid loves assembly the robot characters and then painting them.

An exciting start to a new mixed reality game, I'm looking forward to seeing where this goes. We need more games like this, that think outside the box for controls. Some refinement still to go, but it's off to a strong start.
